title: Deenz Set Of 3 Piece Crushed Jewel Diamond Bathroom Accessories Soap Dispenser Toothbrush Holder & Soap Holder In Silver
features: This bathroom accessories set includes 3 pieces - a soap dispenser, toothbrush holder, soap holder, all in shiny silver color with crushed jewel diamond accents.
The set comes in an elegant gift box. The soap dispenser measures 8cm in length, 8cm in width, and 20cm in height.
The toothbrush holder measures 8cm in length, 8cm in width, and 14cm in height. The soap holder measures 10cm in length, 12cm in width, and 3cm in height.
This set not only serves a functional purpose but also adds a touch of style to any bathroom.
To clean, simply wipe with a damp cloth or non-abrasive cleaner.
